title: AmpXtreme
description: Taking Amplified world generation to the next level.
body:
# AmpXtreme
Taking Amplified world generation to the next level.

![cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf699b3a8ecf5c93e19035b0c064f599b4d73ec9.jpeg)

This data pack scales up Amplified generation to the highest possible world height, up to y=2031, and also adds vertical biome transitions.

The monumental scale and sheer complexity of the resulting generation is extraordinary! I've also made some adjustments to make this suitable for survival worlds, offering a unique and challenging experience full of wonder.

How to use: create new world, select AMPLIFIED generation type, and add this datapack to the world. Performance optimization mods and increased memory recommended for high render distances. I also recommend [Higher Snow Lines](https://modrinth.com/mod/higher-snow-lines) so that snow starts higher up and doesn't just cover the whole world above the vanilla build limit.

![crop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64d0855f39d2591d6475ce69b9cf74efcadce7e4.jpeg)

![heat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a690107c3a1551ccaa817d29c469827b6631d9e.jpeg)

![up](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5cdbe9fa3f55edd4ff88c0d72ab70ae30419225.jpeg)

![down](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/987757230c209cf8fcd64df3526146a04e8de204.jpeg)

![monolithic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3deb81d3344e900c46f2186d658c0adc2ce7703.jpeg)
